subject: Update PATHS.py docstring examples and run final Phase 2 verification
description: In Z:/_dev-ssd/thesis-manifold/PATHS.py, update every docstring Example: line that shows an old-style path containing the 'thesis\\' segment (e.g. 'C:\\dev\\thesis-manifold\\thesis\\modelling', 'C:\\dev\\thesis-manifold\\thesis\\data\\_00_raw') to match the flattened structure (drop the 'thesis\\' segment, e.g. 'C:\\dev\\thesis-manifold\\02_thesis_data\\_00_raw'). Update print_all_paths() to print the new constants added in tasks 1-3 (THESIS_CONTEXT_DIR, THESIS_RESEARCH_DIR, THESIS_RESULTS_DIR, THESIS_WRITING_DIR, THESIS_MODELLING_TRAINING_DIR, THESIS_MODELLING_SERVING_DIR, THESIS_DATA_ENGINEERED_BYMONTH_DIR, THESIS_DATA_ENGINEERED_BYCHAIN_DIR) alongside the existing ones. Depends on tasks 1-3 all being complete. Final Phase 2 verification: run python3 -c "from PATHS import ROOT_DIR, THESIS_CONTEXT_DIR, THESIS_RESEARCH_DIR, THESIS_RESEARCH_QUESTIONS_DIR, THESIS_RESEARCH_LITERATURE_DIR, THESIS_DATA_DIR, THESIS_MODELLING_DIR, THESIS_MODELLING_TRAINING_DIR, THESIS_MODELLING_SERVING_DIR, THESIS_MODELLING_SERVING_SYSTEM_A_DIR, THESIS_MODELLING_SERVING_SYSTEM_B_DIR, THESIS_RESULTS_DIR, THESIS_RESULTS_SRQ1_DIR, THESIS_RESULTS_SRQ2_DIR, THESIS_RESULTS_SRQ4_DIR, THESIS_WRITING_DIR, THESIS_DATA_ENGINEERED_BYMONTH_DIR, THESIS_DATA_ENGINEERED_BYCHAIN_DIR; print('Phase 2 OK')" and confirm it prints without error (paths resolve as Path objects even though the target folders do not physically exist yet -- that is expected and fine at this stage since folder creation is deferred to Phase 4 and will use copy, not move, per the updated execution strategy). Use the safe temp-script edit pattern per project hook rule.
activeForm: Updating PATHS.py docstrings and running Phase 2 verification
